word: Adipose tissue stores energy in the body.
definition: (of body tissue) used for the storage of fat.

word: Adjuvant therapy is often used after surgery to prevent recurrence.
definition: helping or assisting, especially in a medical context

word: His mouth was agape in astonishment at the magic trick.
definition: (of the mouth) wide open, especially with surprise or wonder

word: The patient was ambulatory after the surgery.
definition: Relating to or adapted for walking; able to walk.

word: The baby was surrounded by amniotic fluid.
definition: relating to the amnion or amniotic fluid

word: Anabolic steroids are used to build muscle mass.
definition: relating to or promoting anabolism (the synthesis of complex molecules in living organisms).

word: Climate change is largely driven by anthropogenic factors.
definition: originating in human activity

word: Many ancient gods were depicted as anthropomorphic figures.
definition: having human characteristics

word: The case went to the appellate court.
definition: concerned with or dealing with applications for decisions to be reversed

word: They conducted an astrophysical study of distant galaxies.
definition: relating to astrophysics

word: The graph shows an asymptotic curve approaching the x-axis.
definition: relating to or approaching an asymptote (a line that a curve approaches as it heads towards infinity)

word: The patient was diagnosed with atrial fibrillation.

word: Autosomal dominant inheritance means only one copy of an altered gene is needed to cause the disorder.

word: Acetic acid is a simple carboxylic acid.

word: Many biological molecules are chiral, existing as left- or right-handed forms.

word: A cochlear implant can help people with severe hearing loss.

word: Loss of memory is a concomitant symptom of the disease.

word: Convective currents in the atmosphere can lead to thunderstorms.

word: The museum displayed ancient Coptic manuscripts.

word: The samples were stored in a cryogenic freezer.

word: The rash caused a severe cutaneous reaction.

word: The cytoplasmic membrane plays a crucial role in cell function.

word: The neuron has a complex dendritic structure.

word: Her argument was based on a complex dialectical process.

word: Rubber is a good dielectric material.

word: The battery relies on an electrochemical reaction to produce power.

word: The plant produces endogenous hormones.

word: Endothelial cells line the inside of blood vessels.

word: Epigenetic changes can affect how genes are expressed without altering the DNA sequence.

word: The book was full of esoteric references that only a few scholars could understand.

word: The anthropologist conducted extensive ethnographic research.

word: The plant's growth was influenced by exogenous factors like sunlight.

word: The report detailed several cases of extrajudicial killings.

word: A lawyer has a fiduciary duty to their clients.

word: The regime was accused of genocidal acts.

word: Geodetic surveys are crucial for accurate mapping.

word: Ancient Gnostic texts offer a different perspective on early Christianity.

word: The patient was diagnosed with hemorrhagic fever.

word: The teacher used a heuristic approach to problem-solving.

word: The biopsy required a detailed histological examination.

word: The doctor diagnosed her with idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis, meaning the cause was unknown.

word: The spacecraft used an inertial guidance system to navigate.

word: Interstitial fluid fills the spaces between cells in the body.

word: The patient suffered an ischemic stroke due to a blocked artery.

word: Scientists use isotopic analysis to determine the age of ancient artifacts.

word: The sorceress cast a maleficent spell on the kingdom.

word: Mitochondrial DNA is inherited from the mother.

word: The patient was diagnosed with mitral valve prolapse.

word: Scientists are developing new monoclonal antibodies for cancer treatment.

word: Linguists study the morphological changes in languages over time.

word: The study investigated the pharmacological effects of the new compound.

word: Scientists use phylogenetic analysis to understand the relationships between different species.

word: Piezoelectric materials are used in many sensors and transducers.

word: The organization operates as a quasi-governmental body.

word: She had a penchant for recherche wines.
